allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('peer deps:', p.get\('peerDependencies',{}\)\); print\('deps:', {k:v for k,v in p.get\('dependencies',{}\).items\(\) if 'opencode' in k}\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for k, v in data.items\(\): if 'google' in k.lower\(\): safe = {kk: \(vv[:20]+'...' if isinstance\(vv, str\) and len\(vv\) > 20 else vv\) for kk, vv in v.items\(\)} print\(k, safe\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('accounts:', len\(d.get\('accounts',[]\)\)\) for a in d.get\('accounts',[]\): print\(' -', a.get\('email'\), '| token:', bool\(a.get\('refreshToken'\)\)\) ")
